content.source_context: Migrated from v1 expert output: polish_reform
content.statement: The 2022 PISA decline can be partially attributed to the 2016–2019 reversal's effects, separable from COVID-19 learning loss, because the full reversal affected only the 2022 cohort; however, the counterfactual outcome under the 1999 reform structure without COVID is unobserved and must be estimated.
